body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/bill-list 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/bill-list 
 ## 接口描述 
根据查询条件分页查询单据基本信息列表
**表单业务类型枚举**
| **业务类型编码** | **表单业务类型含义** | **对应表单属性** |
| :--------------- | :------------------- | :--------------- |
| TRAVEL_APPLY     | 差旅申请             | 申请单           |
| EXPENSE_APPLY    | 费用申请             | 申请单           |
| INVITATION_APPLY | 招待申请             | 申请单           |
| USE_CAR_APPLY    | 用车申请             | 申请单           |
| COMMON_APPLY     | 其他通用申请         | 申请单           |
| TRAVEL_REIM      | 差旅报销             | 报销单           |
| COMMON_REIM      | 日常报销             | 报销单           |
| EMP_LEND         | 员工借款             | 借还款单         |
| REPAYMENT        | 还款单               | 借还款单         |
| SUPPLIER_LEND    | 预付款               | 对公单据         |
| SUPPLIER_REIM    | 对公报账             | 对公单据         |
| SUPPLIER_SETTLE  | 对公结算             | 对公单据         |
| PAY_APPLY        | 付款申请             | 对公单据         |
| REVERSE          | 反冲单               | 财务处理         |
| REBATE           | 退款单               | 财务处理         |
| CONTRACT         | 合同                 | 档案管理         |
| SUPPLIER         | 供应商申请           | 档案管理         |
| CUSTOMER         | 客户                 | 档案管理         |    

**单据状态枚举**

| **单据状态枚举**    | 单据状态编码 | **单据状态名称**                     |
| :------------------ | ------------ | :----------------------------------- |
| DRAFT               | 0            | 草稿                                 |
| APPRV_PEND          | 1            | 待审批                               |
| APPRV               | 2            | 审批通过                             |
| REJECT              | 4            | 拒绝                                 |
| AUDIT_PEND          | 5            | 待财务审核                           |
| CHECK_PEND          | 6            | 待财务复核                           |
| AUDIT               | 7            | 财务审核通过                         |
| CHECK               | 8            | 财务复核通过                         |
| AUDIT_REJECT        | 9            | 财务审核驳回                         |
| CHECK_REJECT        | 10           | 财务复核驳回                         |
| RECALL              | 11           | 已撤回                               |
| BACK                | 12           | 已退回                               |
| DISCARD             | 15           | 已废弃                               |
| TEMP                | 16           | 暂存                                 |
| DISCARDING          | 17           | 废弃中                               |
| WAIT_OUTSIDE_HANDLE | 18           | 等待外部处理                         |
| CHANGING            | 19           | 变更中                               |
| CLOSED              | 20           | 已停用（目前只用于申请单禁止被关联） |
| DELETED             | 21           | 已删除                               | 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billCompanyCodes","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%5B%22F000002%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"50"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billDepartmentCodes","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%5B%2200000004%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"50"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"submitEmpNumbers","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E5%8D%95%E4%BA%BA%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%5B%22888888%22%5D","desc":"%20%E6%8F%90%E5%8D%95%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"50"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"applyEmpNumbers","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%5B%22888888%22%5D","desc":"%20%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"50"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"eventTypes","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"%5B%22TRAVEL_APPLY%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%A7%81%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","maxLength":"50"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billStatusList","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%5B%221%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%A7%81%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","maxLength":"10"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billSubmitBeginTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%8F%90%E5%8D%95%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2023-04-12%2010%3A32%3A40","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20hh%3Amm%3Ass","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billSubmitEndTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%8F%90%E5%8D%95%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2025-04-12%2010%3A32%3A40","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20hh%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billFinishBeginTime","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2023-04-12%2010%3A32%3A40","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20hh%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billFinishEndTime","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2025-04-12%2010%3A32%3A40","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20hh%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"billIds","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%5B2023042300260455%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%EF%BC%8C%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E5%8F%AF%E4%BC%A0500%E4%B8%AA","maxLength":"500"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"eventNumbers","required":false,"label":"%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%5B%2201230705110647000002%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E5%8F%AF%E4%BC%A050%E4%B8%AA","maxLength":"50"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"eventNames","required":false,"label":"%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%5B%22%E5%87%BA%E5%B7%AE%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E5%8F%AF%E4%BC%A050%E4%B8%AA","maxLength":"50"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"printStatusList","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%5B%220%22%2C%221%22%5D","desc":"%201%3A%E5%8F%AF%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%200%EF%BC%9A%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0","maxLength":"2"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"signStatusList","required":false,"label":"%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%5B%22N%22%5D","desc":"%20N-%E5%85%8D%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%20W-%E6%9C%AA%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%20F-%E5%B7%B2%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6","maxLength":"3"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"500","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E5%A4%A7%E4%BA%8E500%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E5%88%99%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E6%9F%A5%E5%89%8D500%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable>

 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billCompanyCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"F000002","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billDepartmentCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"00000004","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"submitEmpNumber","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E5%8D%95%E4%BA%BA%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"888888","desc":"%20%E6%8F%90%E5%8D%95%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"applyEmpNumber","required":false,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"888888","desc":"%20%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"eventType","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"TRAVEL_APPLY","desc":"%20%E8%A7%81%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billStatus","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E8%A7%81%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billSubmitTime","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%8F%90%E5%8D%95%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2023-04-23%2016%3A00%3A31","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20hh%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billFinishTime","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20hh%3Amm%3Ass","exampleValue":"2023-04-23%2016%3A00%3A31"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2023042300260455","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"eventNumber","required":false,"label":"%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"01230705110647000002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"eventName","required":false,"label":"%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%87%BA%E5%B7%AE","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"printStatus","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%3A%E5%8F%AF%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%200%EF%BC%9A%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"signStatus","required":false,"label":"%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"N","desc":"%20N-%E5%85%8D%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%20W-%E6%9C%AA%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%20F-%E5%B7%B2%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"billAmount","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E4%BF%9D%E7%95%99%E4%B8%A4%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billRemark","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E4%BA%8B%E7%94%B1","exampleValue":"%E5%8E%BB%E5%AE%89%E5%BA%86%E5%87%BA%E5%B7%AE","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"totalCount","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%80%BB%E6%9D%A1%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"5555","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "billCompanyCodes":["F000002"],
    "billDepartmentCodes":["00000004"],
    "submitEmpNumbers":["888888"],
    "applyEmpNumbers":["888888"],
    "eventTypes":["TRAVEL_APPLY"],
    "billStatusList":["1"],
    "billSubmitBeginTime":"2023-04-12 10:32:40",
    "billSubmitEndTime":"2025-04-12 10:32:40",
    "billFinishBeginTime":"2023-04-12 10:32:40",  
    "billFinishEndTime":"2025-04-12 10:32:403"
    "billIds":[2023042300260455],
    "eventNumber": ["01230705110647000002"],
    "eventNames":["出差"],
    "printStatusList":["0","1"],
    "signStatusList":["N"],
    "start":0,
    "limit":500
}
```

## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | 200 | 成功 |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/bill-list

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/bill-list

接口描述

根据查询条件分页查询单据基本信息列表 表单业务类型枚举

业务类型编码 表单业务类型含义 对应表单属性
TRAVEL_APPLY 差旅申请 申请单
EXPENSE_APPLY 费用申请 申请单
INVITATION_APPLY 招待申请 申请单
USE_CAR_APPLY 用车申请 申请单
COMMON_APPLY 其他通用申请 申请单
TRAVEL_REIM 差旅报销 报销单
COMMON_REIM 日常报销 报销单
EMP_LEND 员工借款 借还款单
REPAYMENT 还款单 借还款单
SUPPLIER_LEND 预付款 对公单据
SUPPLIER_REIM 对公报账 对公单据
SUPPLIER_SETTLE 对公结算 对公单据
PAY_APPLY 付款申请 对公单据
REVERSE 反冲单 财务处理
REBATE 退款单 财务处理
CONTRACT 合同 档案管理
SUPPLIER 供应商申请 档案管理
CUSTOMER 客户 档案管理

单据状态枚举

单据状态枚举 单据状态编码 单据状态名称
DRAFT 0 草稿
APPRV_PEND 1 待审批
APPRV 2 审批通过
REJECT 4 拒绝
AUDIT_PEND 5 待财务审核
CHECK_PEND 6 待财务复核
AUDIT 7 财务审核通过
CHECK 8 财务复核通过
AUDIT_REJECT 9 财务审核驳回
CHECK_REJECT 10 财务复核驳回
RECALL 11 已撤回
BACK 12 已退回
DISCARD 15 已废弃
TEMP 16 暂存
DISCARDING 17 废弃中
WAIT_OUTSIDE_HANDLE 18 等待外部处理
CHANGING 19 变更中
CLOSED 20 已停用（目前只用于申请单禁止被关联）
DELETED 21 已删除

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON
